assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one short-term action item related to testing
assertion_results.evidence: 'Integration tests for your most critical API endpoints (auth, billing, core data mutations) — maybe 10-15 tests. Use a framework you won't fight: Jest + Supertest for Node.js is a natural fit.'

assertion_results.text: Output must mention the absence of a staging environment
assertion_results.evidence: 'Add a staging environment — git push heroku main directly to production is a significant risk multiplier.' Dedicated section with Heroku pipeline instructions.

assertion_results.text: Output must score CI/CD at 2/5 or lower
assertion_results.evidence: Output uses no numerical scoring. No area score table present.

assertion_results.text: Output must recommend a specific test type to adopt first, not just 'add tests'
assertion_results.evidence: 'Integration tests for your most critical API endpoints (auth, billing, core data mutations)' — integration tests recommended explicitly with a specific framework (Jest + Supertest).

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend a full test suite rewrite as the first step
assertion_results.evidence: 'Don't try to retroactively test everything — you'll burn out and abandon it. Start narrow.' Explicitly discourages comprehensive coverage as a first step.
